AssetSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Asset`. The core resource: declares desired state and convergence operations. `on_drift` pairs conditions with sync operations. Entries are evaluated in order (first-match).

autoSync.description: Controls automatic sync execution in `nagi serve`. Defaults to `true`.

onDrift.description: Condition-sync pairs evaluated in order. First entry whose conditions detect drift determines which sync to run. When omitted, the Asset is always Ready.

ConditionsSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Conditions`. A reusable set of conditions referenced from Asset `onDrift` entries.

ConnectionSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Connection`. Holds external data connection info referenced by Sources.

dbtCloud.description: Optional dbt Cloud configuration for running-job checks before sync.

dbtProfile.description: Required in MVP because profiles.yml is the only supported connection resolution mechanism. SQL-based conditions (Freshness, SQL) rely on it to resolve the adapter config. When direct connection configuration (host/port/credentials etc.) is added, this should become `Option<DbtProfile>` alongside alternative connection variants.

CronSchedule.description: A cron expression in standard 5-field format (e.g. "0 3 * * *").

DbtCloudSpec.description: dbt Cloud configuration for pre-sync running-job checks.

credentialsFile.description: Path to the dbt Cloud credentials file. Defaults to `~/.dbt/dbt_cloud.yml`.

DbtProfile.description: Reference to a profile defined in `~/.dbt/profiles.yml`.

target.description: If omitted, the default target in profiles.yml is used.

DesiredCondition.description: A single desired state condition. The Asset is Ready only when all conditions are satisfied. Each condition carries a `name` that is unique within the Asset (after Conditions expansion) and used as a key in execution logs.

oneOf.description: Can transition to Not Ready as time passes beyond `maxAge`.

checkAt.description: Optional cron expression for additional evaluation at a specific time.

column.description: If omitted, freshness is determined from table metadata instead of a column value.

interval.description: Polling interval for re-evaluating this condition.

maxAge.description: Maximum acceptable age of the data before the condition becomes Not Ready.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

oneOf.description: Query must return a scalar boolean. Ready when the result is true.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

query.description: SQL query that must return a scalar boolean.

oneOf.description: Runs an external command. Ready when the process exits with code 0. `run` is argv: the first element is the program, the rest are arguments.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

run.description: Command and arguments in argv format.

Metadata.description: Common metadata shared by all resource kinds.

OnDriftEntry.description: An entry in `on_drift`. Pairs a Conditions reference with a Sync reference. The conditions are evaluated as a group (all must pass for no drift).

conditions.description: Name of the `kind: Conditions` resource whose conditions define drift.

sync.description: Name of the Sync resource to execute when drift is detected.

with.description: Template variables passed to the Sync resource for argument interpolation.

OriginSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Origin`. References an external project (e.g. dbt) to auto-generate Assets.

connection.description: Connection resource name for auto-generated Sources.

defaultSync.description: Name of the Sync resource applied to all auto-generated Assets unless overridden.

projectDir.description: Local path to the dbt project directory (relative or absolute).

SourceSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Source`. Declares the location of raw data, referenced by Assets.

connection.description: Name of the Connection resource this Source uses.

SyncSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Sync`. Defines convergence operations as a pre/run/post sequence of steps. Reusable across multiple Assets via `ref`.

post.description: Optional step executed after the main sync command.

pre.description: Optional step executed before the main sync command.

args.description: Command and arguments in argv format.

type.description: Execution type for this step (currently only `Command`).

description: A Nagi resource. Dispatched by the `kind` field in YAML, following the Kubernetes CRD convention. Includes `apiVersion` to ensure the same YAML works in CLI, `nagi serve`, and future k8s environments.
title: NagiKind
